title: festuca ovina subsp. major
intro: Festuca ovina subsp. major, also known as sheep's fescue, is a perennial grass species belonging to the Poaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which have been utilized to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Festuca ovina subsp. major include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory problems, and support digestive health. Herbal preparations of sheep's fescue can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
